questionText: Complete the following table for each of the tax systems you are regulated by.
questionKo: 귀사가 규제 받는 모든 탄소세에 대한 세부사항을 입력하십시오 .
sectorTags: Oil & Gas, Coal, General, Aviation, Capital goods, Transport OEMS - EPM, Chemicals, Metals & mining, Transport services, Steel, Agricultural commodities, Transport OEMS, Energy utilities & power generators, Cement, Food, beverage & tobacco, Paper & forestry, Real estate, Construction
simpleHelp: This question allows data users to track and analyze in a detailed and consistent manner, the organizations' participation in carbon tax systems, as well as what costs they currently bear.

columns.popup_help: Please note that the period reported should overlap with the reporting year.
columns.popup_helpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사가 규제 받는 모든 탄소세에 대한 세부사항을 입력하십시오'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.

columns.popup_help: Please note that the period reported should overlap with the reporting year.
columns.popup_helpKo: 이 문항은 '귀사가 규제 받는 모든 탄소세에 대한 세부사항을 입력하십시오'에 대한 배경 설명입니다. CDP 응답자는 보고연도 기준으로 조직의 환경 관련 현황, 리스크, 기회, 성과 또는 관리체계를 문항의 응답 구조에 맞춰 설명해야 합니다.

columns.text: % of total Scope 1 emissions covered by tax

guidance.text: This question only appears if you select a carbon tax system in response to 3.5.1.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항 응답에 필요한 추가 작성 기준을 설명합니다. 응답방법과 선택지를 함께 확인하여 작성하십시오.

guidance.text:
General 
Carbon taxes aim to directly charge emitters for pollution costs, with policy applications varying across systems and affecting sectors differently. For example, some policies may tax producers directly; others may attribute the cost to consumers of the processed fossil fuels (i.e. utilities); and others yet may tax users such as in the form of big businesses. 
This question pertains solely to direct Scope 1 emissions subject to a carbon tax.
Period start date and end date (columns 1 and 2) 
Ensure the period reported overlaps with the reporting year.
% of total Scope 1 emissions covered by tax (column 3) 
Provide the percentage of your total Scope 1 emissions covered by the tax over the period specified in columns 1 and 2. 
Total cost of tax paid (column 4) 
Report the total cost of tax paid during the period specified in columns 1 and 2.
Comment (column 5) (optional) 
If you select "Other carbon tax, please specify" in 3.5.1, provide the full name of the carbon tax in this column.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 위 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text:
Implementation of carbon tax: Below are some examples of taxes attributed to various producing/consuming entities.
- British Columbia Revenue-Neutral Carbon Tax (2008): The British Columbia carbon tax is a regional carbon tax. The policy applies to all sectors in aims of nudging business towards more energy efficient, and thus more cost efficient, operations. Tax revenue is recycled back to payers in the form of other reductions or returns. Fossil fuel producers and importers are liable for a monthly payment of the tax.
- Japan's Tax for Climate Change Mitigation (2012): Japan's carbon tax applies to all sectors and even with some exemptions, captures almost 70% of the country's GHG emissions. The tax aims to fairly distribute the cost of fossil fuel usage and incentivize the transition to a low-carbon economy. Costs are incurred by the fossil fuel producers, who are expected to pay the tax on a bimonthly basis.
- United Kingdom Carbon Price Floor (2013): The UK's CPF covers the power sector at a higher tax rate than the EU ETS market price. This policy considers power producers as the users of fossil fuels and thus attributes the quarterly tax for fossil fuels to them.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 응답 작성 시 참고할 수 있는 추가 설명입니다. 필요한 경우 관련 기준, 방법론, 내부 검토 자료를 근거로 활용하십시오.

sectorTagsKo: 석유 및 가스, 석탄, 일반, 항공, 자본재, 운송 OEM - EPM, 화학, 금속 및 광업, 운송 서비스, 철강, 농산물 원자재, 운송 OEM, 에너지 유틸리티 및 발전, 시멘트, 식품, 음료 & 담배, 제지 및 임업, 부동산, 건설
simpleHelpKo: 이 문항은 조직에 중대한 영향을 미쳤거나 향후 영향을 미칠 수 있는 환경 리스크와 기회를 확인하는 항목입니다. 응답 시 영향 범위, 발생 위치, 가치사슬 단계, 재무적 또는 전략적 영향을 함께 검토하십시오. 문항명: 귀사가 규제 받는 모든 탄소세에 대한 세부사항을 입력하십시오.
translationSourceKo: CDP 국문 양식 기반 국문 보정
listTitleEn: Complete the following table for each of the tax systems you are regulated by.
listTitleKo: 귀사가 규제 받는 모든 탄소세에 대한 세부사항을 입력하십시오 .
